title: Recent awards and accolades | BAL in the news | BAL Immigration Law
content:
## BAL scores highest ranking in Chambers USA Guide 2026 for immigration
The Chambers USA Guide 2026 is out, marking BAL’s 14th year of being nationally recognized as a top immigration law…

### BAL recognized by US News & World Report as a top law firm to work for in 2026

### BAL designated as a 2026 Best Place for Working Parents®

## See how BAL can help with your immigration needs.

## Our unique business model
We are structured as one team, one brand, one P&L with one standard of excellence and one unifying technology. Our oneBAL approach ensures all of our teams, including legal, IT, training, knowledge management, quality assurance, onboarding and client relationships, support one another to deliver exceptional service.
